decision_references: Use the $500 as limited honoraria for volunteer expert work
controls: Aggregate honoraria commitments and disbursements must not exceed USD 500 unless a later owner-approved funding decision changes the ceiling.
No individual amount, eligibility rule, or payment promise is approved by this plan.
The project must not describe the honoraria pool as covering the full estimated economic cost of the work.
Public recruitment remains closed until the delivery window, honoraria allocation rule, eligibility thresholds, and responsible human operator are approved.
Additional funding must remain separately traceable from the initial USD 500 ceiling.
unresolved_parameters: Honoraria allocation rule across six core raters and two adjudicators.
Minimum completed-contribution threshold for honorarium eligibility.
Payment administration, tax, jurisdiction, and legal review.
External-funding target, application owner, and trigger date.

next_decision.question: What delivery window and honoraria allocation rule should govern the eight-person panel?
